sql.title: SQL for Beginners
sql.description: Learn SQL from zero with hands-on practice.
sql.moreComingSoon: More SQL for Beginners lessons are coming soon.

sql_module_5.title: Expressions, Aliases, and Simple Functions
sql_module_5.description: Create useful calculated values, rename outputs clearly, and use beginner-friendly SQL functions.
outcomes: Create calculated columns with arithmetic expressions.
Use aliases to make query results easier to read.
Apply simple text, number, and date functions.
Build small report-style outputs from raw table data.
why: Real reports often need values that are calculated from existing columns.
Readable output helps learners explain query results clearly.

sql_module_11.title: Inserting Data
sql_module_11.description: Shift from reading data to adding new rows carefully and correctly.
outcomes: Use explicit column lists for safer statements.
Recognize how defaults and NULL values affect inserts.
why: Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

section_5_1.title: Creating New Values in Queries
section_5_1.description: Create useful calculated values directly inside SELECT statements using arithmetic and expressions.

section_5_2.title: Column Aliases
section_5_2.description: Rename selected and calculated columns so query results are easier to read and explain.

section_5_3.title: Simple SQL Functions
section_5_3.description: Explore beginner-friendly SQL functions for text, numbers, and dates without overcomplicating the query.

section_5_4.title: Expression Practice
section_5_4.description: Use expressions and aliases to build simple report-style outputs such as discounts, totals, and renamed columns.

section_11_1.title: Intro to Adding Data
section_11_1.description: Learn what INSERT INTO does and how SQL adds new rows to a table safely.

section_11_2.title: Safe Inserting
section_11_2.description: Use explicit column lists, data type awareness, and careful checks to avoid insert mistakes.

section_11_3.title: Insert with NULL and Defaults
section_11_3.description: Understand how NULL, default values, optional columns, and required fields affect INSERT statements.

section_11_4.title: Insert Practice
section_11_4.description: Practice adding records to realistic tables and checking that inserted data appears correctly.
